metadata.description: PRMP vs Attention (GATConv) comparison on Amazon Video Games

key_comparisons.PRMP_SAGE_vs_GAT: If PRMP_SAGE < GAT RMSE: predict-subtract is superior to attention
key_comparisons.PRMP_GAT_vs_GAT: If PRMP_GAT < GAT: mechanisms are complementary
key_comparisons.PRMP_GAT_vs_PRMP_SAGE: If PRMP_GAT < PRMP_SAGE: attention on residuals helps further
key_comparisons.GAT_vs_SAGE: Attention improvement over mean aggregation baseline
